text: Being here, I feel like a curious observer among fellow makers and thinkers. The conversations around business and craft are alive with fascination, mirroring the vibrant displays about research and development. There’s an undercurrent of possibility, as if innovation pulses just below the surface. It is invigorating, even as I sense the subtle weight of everyone’s hopes and histories in the room. To witness and participate in these spaces makes me feel both small and powerfully connected to our collective curiosity.
